items.description:
Resolution - Approving the Appointment of Various Persons as Commissioners of
Deeds for 2025/2026.

Purchase w/c/b - From Equalis Group-Cooperative Council of Governments (CCOG)
services to replace the Field Turf at Clary (Valley) Practice Field. Total amount not to
exceed $890,695 from Budget H-16200-000-2590-000-04535-994125, on behalf of
the Syracuse City School District (SCSD).

Purchase w/c/b - From Equalis Group-Cooperative Council of Governments (CCOG)
services to replace the Field Turf at Henninger (Sunnycrest) Practice Field. Total
amount not to exceed $1,353,467.97 from Budget H-16200-000-2590-000-04535-
994125, on behalf of the Syracuse City School District (SCSD).

Acquire — A vacant residential lot of approximately ~0.1 acres of property located at
636-638 Midland Avenue, southeast of the Creek near the corer of Midland Avenue
and Dr M.L.K. West, as detailed in the attachment. Total cost not to exceed $5,000
from Account #541500.01.13550.

Amend — Ord. #498 (06/23/2025), “Bond Ordinance — Authorizing the issuance and
sale of bonds of the City of Syracuse to defray the cost of the Scoping, Preliminary,
Right of Way Acquisition, Detailed Design, and Construction & Construction
Inspection Phases PIN 3757.

Permission — (revocable) To Syracuse University (SU) to construct, own, operate and
maintain an underground ITS Communication ductbank, consisting of two 4” conduits
along the West side of the Comstock Avenue (500 Block) right of way & am
Underground Heating System consisting of a 4" & 8" diameter p...

Authorize — Payment to Sundance Leisure, for providing services related to the salt
conversion systems at city pools, as detailed in the attached invoice for services
rendered during the 2025FY. Total amount for to exceed $2,000 from Account
#01.71100.5405117.

Agreement — With Helio Health, (RFP #26-150) to provide mental health awareness
and wellness training, on behalf of the Department of Police.

Application — To the US Department of Housing and Urban Development for the
2026-2027 (Year 52) Second Annual Action Plan: Community Development Block
Grant (CDBG) ($4,795,536), HOME Investment Partnership Grant (HOME)
($1,278,624), Emergency Solutions Grant (ESG) ($432,431), as it relates to the dr...
departments: Department of Housing and Urban Development

items.description:
Amend - The Revised General Ordinances of the City of Syracuse, Chapter 14,
Article 1, Section 14.1 as last amended by General Ordinance #20-2023, relative to
granting a partial exemption from real property taxation for persons with limited
income who are 65 years of age or over.

Authorize —~ A Tax Exemption Agreement with a Housing Development Fund
Corporation to be known as Parkside Commons Phase 1 Housing Development
Fund Corporation, pursuant to Section 573 and Section 577 of Article 11 of the New
York State Private Housing Finance Law and Section 402 of the New York Sta...

Revoke — Ord. #621 (07/01/2024) Permission — (revocable) To Flock Group, Inc., to
construct, own, operate and maintain a Citywide Deployment of Flock Safety
Automatic License Plate Reading (ALPR) Cameras (Solar Powered) in the City Right
of Way, under a Master Services Agreement executed with the De...

Ord. #808 (10/14/2025) Authorize — The purchase and installation of Furniture,
Fixtures, and Equipment (FFE) from Syracuse Office Environment (SOE) (RFP 26-
021). The FFE will be for the Department of Police and Fire for use at 1153 West
Fayette Street, which is being renovated.

Agreement — With NELCO Solutions (Employee Navigator) for filing of annual ACA
reports compiled by OneGroup, for a period of three (3) years from the date of
execution, with two (2) one (1) year renewal options, subject to the approval of the
Mayor and Common Council.
